sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this NES shmup/platformer hybrid

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Shooting Sequences
special_mechanics.description: Even-numbered stages (2, 4, 6, etc.) feature auto-scrolling Gradius-like shooter gameplay where the character jumps into different vehicles for side-scrolling shooter action

special_mechanics.name: Floating Platform Boss Arena
special_mechanics.description: In transition areas before platformer boss fights, Apollo stands on a controllable floating platform while fighting bosses against a black background

special_mechanics.name: Tube Shooter Final Level
special_mechanics.description: Final level features fixed shooter gameplay where Apollo in an enhanced ship rotates from screen sides to bottom, shooting at center while avoiding enemy fire

special_mechanics.name: Auto-scrolling Shooter Corridors
special_mechanics.description: Brief auto-scrolling shooter segments within mechanical castles; wrong door choice loops player back

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise physics parameters documented. Game is a platformer/shmup hybrid with no available technical movement data in provided sources. Gameplay described qualitatively through level design and mechanics rather than physics values.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Xexyz article
